scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.check:syntax: node --check electron/main.mjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check scripts/server.mjs && node --check scripts/client.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run test:server && npm run check:syntax
